creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The code also resides at

https://pypi.python.org/pypi/progressbar

but I didn't manage to patch the Makefile on the fly to get the sources from there. There is also an issue with fetch and SSL, some need to set SSL_NO_VERIFY_PEER=1, otherwise I receive a authentication error.

Fetching the sources with a weird URL works:

env SSL_NO_VERIFY_PEER=1 fetch http://pypi.python.org/packages/0f/e1/f30b72ecabba259c7c38dd0eb944a173effced3fd7de2c9c2902bd6f649a/progressbar-2.3.tar.gz
